scripts.build: echo '🛠️  Building the site' && bunx tailwindcss -i src/index.css -o ./src/v.min.css --minify && bun run scripts/html-minify.ts
scripts.postbuild: echo '🪄  Adding magic sause' && rm -rf build 2> /dev/null && mkdir build && mv ./src/index.min.html ./build/index.html && bun run scripts/image-optimize.ts && cp ./src/sitemap.xml ./build/sitemap.xml && cp ./src/robots.txt ./build/robots.txt && cp ./src/site.webmanifest ./build/site.webmanifest && echo '🤩  Completed! See ./build/-folder'
